items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Actor identity linkage when available'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or records that confirm the existence of actor identity linkage. The linked use case mentions the need for this linkage but lacks concrete evidence of its presence, leading to an inconclusive status.
